trigger: Run B (qwen3.7-max@k4) returned 23/44 — qwen3.7-max is the BEST single model on this pool (> v4-pro 18, > V3.2 16). The original prereg locked the Q1 sampling control as `deepseek-v4-pro @ k8` on the assumption that v4-pro was the strongest single model; the data refuted that assumption. Integrity note: this addendum is committed BEFORE running the new control and BEFORE reading any v4-pro@k8 result — it tightens, it does not relax.
Q1_original_still_runs: deepseek-v4-pro @ k8 vs union(v4-pro@k4,V3.2@k4)=26 — the literal locked control, Run A, left running for completeness (tests whether the ORIGINAL 2-model pair beat its own best member at equal total draws).

Q1prime_the_tighter_control.question: Does the 3-model swarm beat the BEST single model at EQUAL TOTAL compute? union(v4-pro@k4, V3.2@k4, qwen3.7-max@k4) = 30/44 uses 12 draws/theorem (3 models x k4). The equal-total-draws best-single control is qwen3.7-max @ k12.
Q1prime_the_tighter_control.run_C: qwen3.7-max @ k12, full 44 pool, max_rounds=2, temp 0.8+0.05s

decision_rule_locked.EMERGENCE_REAL_if: qwen3.7-max@k12 <= 30 - 3 = 27  (the 3-model union reaches >=3 theorems that the best single model cannot, even given the same 12 draws) → combination is genuine capability, not more-sampling.
decision_rule_locked.JUST_SAMPLING_if: qwen3.7-max@k12 >= 29  (one strong model with 12 draws matches the swarm) → the union uplift is mostly extra draws; TuringOS multi-agent value is cost/parallelism, not capability.
decision_rule_locked.AMBIGUOUS_if: 28 (between thresholds) → inconclusive; run a second independent seed.

why_this_is_the_honest_decisive_test: The architect's grand thesis is 'multiple models -> emergent capability >= a big model.' The cleanest falsifiable form: does combining 3 heterogeneous models (at total compute T) solve more than the single best model given the same total compute T? qwen3.7-max@k12 vs union(3)@k4 is exactly that, on real Lean ground truth with the #print-axioms whitelist. v4-pro@k8 (Run A) tests only the weaker original-pair claim.
discipline: FC1/2/3 untouched; no section-6; integer money; de-branded 3-channel; this rule locked before Run C executes and before any v4-pro@k8 / qwen@k12 result is read.
